title: stipa iberica var. austro-iberica
intro: Stipa iberica var. austro-iberica, also known as the Spanish beard grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stipa iberica var. austro-iberica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Stipa iberica var. austro-iberica is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
